title: Sachi's fps Client
description: This pack is a general mix of performance and QoL mods that are completely client side allowing for great performance even on low end laptops.
body:
Whether you have an old office laptop or a budget rig with less than 8GB of RAM, this modpack ensures you don't have to sacrifice a smooth experience for playability.
### ✨ Key features:

- Smart Utilities: Features like Mouse Tweaks, REI, and Smooth Swapping make crafting and inventory management a more polised experience.
- 
- Total Control: Full controller support via Controlify and advanced sound management with Extreme Sound Muffler.
- 
- Stability First: The pack will detect crashes, using the mod Not Enough Crashes, which in case of a crash will put you in the main menu.

### 💡 Recommendation for the "Slowest" CPUs:

For best performance and stability, I recommend allocating 3GB or 4GB of RAM in your launcher settings. This gives your OS some breathing room while still giving Minecraft enough RAM to function.


Vanilla Minecraft:


![Picture showing performance in vanilla minecraft, 74 fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e452c9f52f90c7f5bf3df41ae70d07aadda4075e.png)

This modpack:

![Image showing performance with this modpack, 176fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32df8e7c3eaffc2f050f72c07f520abadee627fe.png)
